entry.content:
Itr

迭代量化

多个缩放因子

$\boldsymbol{X} \in \mathbf{R}^n$为列向量，$\boldsymbol{A}$的每一列代表量化的一个bit平面，假设量化为k个bit平面，$\boldsymbol{A} \in {0,1}^{n \times k}$, $ \boldsymbol{\alpha} \in \mathbf{R}+^k$. $x_i \approx \sum{j=1}^k \alphaj A{ij}$

$\min\limits_{\boldsymbol{A},\boldsymbol{\alpha}} ||\boldsymbol{X} -\boldsymbol{A}\boldsymbol{\alpha}||_2^2$

固定$\boldsymbol{A}$,求解$\boldsymbol{\alpha}$

固定$\boldsymbol{\alpha}$,求解 $\boldsymbol{A}$

  • 求解$\alpha$所能表达的所有量化值,共$2^k$个值,$round(\boldsymbol{X})$到最近的量化值

迭代求解

单个缩放因子

$\boldsymbol{A} \in {0,1,\dots,2^{k-1}}^{n}$, $ \alpha \in \mathbf{R}+$. $x_i \approx \alpha A{i}$

$\min\limits_{\boldsymbol{A},\alpha} ||\boldsymbol{X} -\boldsymbol{A}\alpha||_2^2$

固定$\boldsymbol{A}$,求解$\boldsymbol{\alpha}$

固定$\boldsymbol{\alpha}$,求解 $\boldsymbol{A}$

基于直方图的快速迭代量化

多个缩放因子

对权重或激活$\boldsymbol{X} \in \mathbf{R}^n$做直方图统计，采样$d$个代表元素，表示为$\boldsymbol{S} \in \mathbf{R}^d$, 每个元素$Si$对应一个概率$P_i$, 对应这个元素的权重, 所有元素的概率分布(对应加权采样)表示为$\boldsymbol{P} \in \mathbf{R}+^d$, 因此可以仅用$d$维向量刻画原来的$n$维向量。 假设量化到$k$个比特，此时量化的bit平面表示为$\boldsymbol{A} \in {0,1}^{d \times k}$, 大大加快量化过程, 此时的量化目标可以写为：

$\min\limits_{\boldsymbol{A},\boldsymbol{\alpha}} \boldsymbol{P}^T [(\boldsymbol{S} - \boldsymbol{A}\boldsymbol{\alpha}) \odot (\boldsymbol{S} - \boldsymbol{A}\boldsymbol{\alpha})]$

固定$\boldsymbol{A}$,求解$\boldsymbol{\alpha}$

固定$\boldsymbol{\alpha}$,求解 $\boldsymbol{A}$

  • 求解$\boldsymbol{\alpha}$所能表达的所有量化值,共$2^k$个值,$round(\boldsymbol{S})$到最近的量化值

单个缩放因子

$\min\limits_{\boldsymbol{A},\boldsymbol{\alpha}} \boldsymbol{P}^T [(\boldsymbol{S} - \boldsymbol{A}\alpha) \odot (\boldsymbol{S} - \boldsymbol{A}\alpha)]$

固定$\boldsymbol{A}$,求解$\alpha$

固定$\boldsymbol{\alpha}$,求解 $\boldsymbol{A}$

主要量化方法

  • 残差量化表示为:Res
  • 迭代量化表示为:Itr
  • Dorefa-net的量化方法表示为:Dorefa
  • 后面“-2b”代表量化为2bit,对于1bit权重的量化，以上3种方法是一致的

网络结构

  • Resnet20为标准的Resnet，在每一层的ReLU后面添加量化层量化激活
    • 适用于Itr,Dorefa的激活量化方式
  • Resnet-BQCA把Batchnorm层提到卷积层前面，量化层接在Batchnorm后面
    • 适用于Itr,Res的激活量化方式

其他量化方法

  • HWGQ表示CVPR2017的激活量化方法
  • Dorefa-clip2 表示修改Dorefa激活量化方式clip(0,1)改为clip(0,2)，保留更多的较大激活输出

只量化权重

Resnet20

entry.title: 量化
entry.content:
量化方式

index+codebook ，可以使用k-means量化，计算开销还是浮点开销

  • ICLR 2016 Deep compression
  • CVPR 2016 quantized CNN

量化为2的幂次，乘法操作可以改成移位操作来实现，但是加法操作？

  • ICLR 2017 INQ
    量化为bit平面，Xnor+popcount(最快)

  • NIPS 2017 ABC

  • AAAI 2017
  • ICCV 2017 HORQ

量化为定点数(等距量化)，负数内积

  • Fixed-Point Feedforward Deep Neural Network
  • Dorefa-net
    • $sinh(x) = \frac{e^x - e^{-x}}{2}$
    • $cosh(x) = \frac{e^x + e^{-x}}{2}$
    • $tanh(x) = \frac{sinh(x)}{cosh(x)}$

残差量化

Binaray {0,1} or Binary {-1,1}

$\alpha_1 = 5,\alpha_2 = 4, \alpha_3 = 2$

  • 二值表示为${-1,1}$ $quant_value = [-11,-7,-3,-1,1,3,7,11]$
    • 0.5量化为-1,而最优解是1,贪心的方式有时不能找到最优解
  • 二值表示为${0,1}$ $quant_value = [0，2，4，5，6，7，9，11]$
    • 不能找到最优解

如果$\alphai > \alpha{i+1} + …+ \alpha_{n}$,(2bit时，该条件肯定成立)
贪心的方式总是能找到最优解
对于二值表示为${-1,1}$成立，对于二值表示为${0,1}$不成立

$\alpha_1 = 4,\alpha_2 = 2, \alpha_3 = 1$

  • 二值表示为${-1,1}$ $quant_value = [-7,-5,-3,-1,1,3,5,7]$
    • 总是可以量化到最优解
  • 二值表示为${0,1}$ $quant_value = [0，1，2，3,4，5，6，7]$
    • 3.99 量化为3，而不是最优解4
    • 换一种量化方式，$\frac{\alpha}{2}$为阈值,而不是$\alpha$为阈值
      总是可以量化到最优解

量化到

迭代优化

$\min\limits_{\boldsymbol{A},\boldsymbol{\alpha}} ||\boldsymbol{X} -\boldsymbol{A}\boldsymbol{\alpha}||_2^2$

$\boldsymbol{X} \in \mathbf{R}^n$为列向量，$\boldsymbol{A}$的每一列代表量化的一个bit平面，假设量化为k个bit平面，$\boldsymbol{A} \in {0,1}^{n \times k}$, $ \boldsymbol{\alpha} \in \mathbf{R}_+^k$
固定$\boldsymbol{A}$,求解$\boldsymbol{\alpha}$

固定$\boldsymbol{\alpha}$,求解 $\boldsymbol{A}$

  • 求解$\alpha$所能表达的所有量化值,共$2^k$个值,$round(\boldsymbol{X})$到最近的量化值

迭代求解

测试时量化的开销

对于测试样本 $\boldsymbol{X} \in \mathbf{R}^{c \times w \times h}$,卷积层$\boldsymbol{W} \in \mathbf{R}^{n \times c \times k \times k} $,卷积操作的开销为

求L1范数的开销为

量化为b个bit平面的开销为

且量化操作只设计浮点加减法，而卷积操作还涉及浮点乘法，因此实际中卷积的开销更小

entry.title: loss_func
entry.content:
SVM_LOSS

$\xi$的选取：Hinge Loss,exp loss…

Hinge Loss

二分类

多分类

Square Hinge Loss (L2-SVM)


在神经网络中，使用SVM_LOSS对其logit做loss，没有softmax这一层
下图是SVM_LOSS和softmax cross entropy loss的对比：

Softmax 反向求导

令 $z_i$ 为第i个logit，$a_i$为第i个softmax。

若$j = i$

若$j eq i$

采用交叉熵损失

参考资料：

http://cs231n.github.io/linear-classify/#intro

HMM

假设n个隐状态，m个观测值
初始概率分布$\pi \in \mathbb{R}^{1 imes n}$
概率转移矩阵$A \in \mathbb{R}^{n imes n}$
观测概率矩阵$B \in \mathbb{R} ^{n imes m}$
evalutae :给定参数$(\pi,A,B)$,预测某个观测序列发生的概率。
已知: 参数 $\lambda = (\pi,A,B)$，观测状态序列 $o{1:T}$
求解: $P(o{1:T}|\lambda)$
定义: $\alphat(i) = P(o{1:t},q_t = S_i|\lambda)$

decode: 给定参数$(\pi,A,B)$,给定某个观测序列，预测每个观测值对应的隐状态。

  • LD_LIBRARY_PATH环境变量用于在$ extbf{程序加载运行}$期间查找动态链接库时指定除了系统默认路径之外的其他路径，注意，LD_LIBRARY_PATH中指定的路径会在系统默认路径之前进行查找。设置方法如下：

编译问题

protoc can’t find

can’t find hdf5.h when build caffe

  • 建立hdf5的软链接
  • 修改Makefile.config

anaconda protobuf 与 linux protobuf版本不一致

python接口编译

  • libstdc++.so.6: version `GLIBCXX_3.4.20’ not found
  • _caffe.so: undefined symbol:_ZN5boost6python6detail11init_moduleER11PyModuleDefPFvvE
  • google.protobuf找不到text_format

使用问题

.prototxt路径

Weight decay

Weight decay 等价于 L2 regularizer.
caffe默认使用L2 regularizer

可视化工具

http://ethereon.github.io/netscope/#/editor

entry.title: Matrix
entry.content:
矩阵分解 (SVD)

对于矩阵 $W \in \mathbb{R} ^{m\times k}$ 和矩阵 $I \in \mathbb{R} ^{n\times m}$，对$W$进行SVD分解，

,
$S$是对角矩阵，对角线上是奇异值，$U,V$都是正交矩阵，$W$可以被近似为$\tilde{W} = \tilde{U} \tilde{S} \tilde{V}^T,\tilde{U} \in \mathbb{R}^{m \times t},\tilde{S} \in \mathbb{R}^{t \times t},\tilde{V} \in \mathbb{R}^{t \times k}$。

那么近似误差

因为

。

$I \tilde{W}$的计算复杂度为 $O(nmt + nt^2 + ntk)$ ，对于足够小的 $t$，时间复杂度比 $O(nmk)$小很多。

张量分解 (Tensor rank decomposition)

CP decomposition

对于d阶张量$\mathcal{A}$,$F \space is \space \mathbb{R} \space or \space \mathbb{C}$

$\lambda_i \in F \quad and \quad \mathbf{a}_i^k \in F^{n_k}$.

HOSVD
entry.summary:
矩阵分解 (SVD)

对于矩阵 $W \in \mathbb{R} ^{m\times k}$ 和矩阵 $I \in \mathbb{R} ^{n\times m}$，对$W$进行SVD分解，

,
$S$是对角矩阵，对角线上是奇异值，$U,V$都是正交矩阵，$W$可以被近似为$\tilde{W} = \tilde{U} \tilde{S} \tilde{V}^T,\tilde{U} \in \mathbb{R}^{m \times t},\tilde{S} \in \mathbb{R}^{t \times t},\tilde{V} \in \mathbb{R}^{t \times k}$。

entry.title: Dataset
entry.content:
ImageNet

1,200,000 训练集 50,000个验证集 150,000个测试集 1000个类别
在Alexnet上 5.2ms 一个input,包括forward和backward

训练一轮大概需要1.733h
所以一般在pretrained的网络，调整网络结构，使用新的数据集，进行retrain
Alexnet 训练90轮 :

直接从头开始pretrain不现实

数据加载

  • 顺序加载，局部shuffle
  • cv2.imdecode 图片解码
  • origin data:tensorpack 的 loader 第一个epoch很慢，之后很快(因为前边部分已经加载到了内存中)

数据预处理

  • resize的方法：
    • google resize，随机裁剪为224x224 (RandomSizedCrop(224))
    • resize 短边为256，随机裁剪为224x224
    • resize 为256x256，随机裁剪为224x224
    • 随机裁剪增加噪声防止过拟合
  • channel变换(很少用)
  • 归一化到[0,1],格式转变为NCHW (这种格式计算效率更高)
  • The mean/std processing 可以提高训练结果.
  • 备注:Note that Caffe LMDB format is not efficient: it stores serialized raw arrays rather than JPEG images.

CUDNN 加速

GPU:Tesla K80，使用Cudnn加速
Alexnet:400 images/sec 1 epoch: 0.833h
GoogLenet:254 images/sec 1 epoch:1.31h

CNN在ImageNet测试集上的比较

层数81922152
Top-5错误16.4%7.3%6.7%3.57%

entry.title: Logic
entry.summary:
猜帽子

  • 3个人，2中颜色的帽子，给每个人随机分配一种颜色的帽子。然后把这3个人放到一起，每个人只能看到其他人的帽子，不能看到自己的帽子。分开这3个人，每个人猜测自己帽子的颜色，每个人可以选择猜或者不猜，只要有一个人猜对且没有人猜错，就算成功。这3个人事先商讨一种策略，使得这3个人成功的概率最大。策略是什么？

entry.title: python学习
entry.content:
python 常用代码

UFT-8

在文件最开头加下面一行代码

CUDA环境变量设置

去除警告log

参数传递

python自带函数

测试程序运行时间

numpy数组操作

显示数组所有元素

浅拷贝

深拷贝

取值

维度置换

tile (重复一个数组)

数组拼接

pycuda

seaborn

seaborn API

联合分布

Parameters:

  • edge_color = 'w' #使得散点图每个点变小
  • marginal_kws = dict(bins=1000) #使得直方图粒度更小

直方图

文件读入，写出

numpy数组

API: numpy.savetxt(filename|handle,numpy.array);numpy.loadtxt(filename)

dict

程序性能分析(cProfile)

  • ncalls：表示函数调用的次数；
  • tottime：表示指定函数的总的运行时间，除掉函数中调用子函数的运行时间；
  • percall：（第一个percall）等于 tottime/ncalls；
  • cumtime：表示该函数及其所有子函数的调用运行的时间，即函数开始调用到返回的时间；
  • percall：（第二个percall）即函数运行一次的平均时间，等于 cumtime/ncalls；
  • filename:lineno(function)：每个函数调用的具体信息；
  • 另外，上面分析的时候，排序方式使用的是函数调用时间(cumulative)，除了这个还有一些其他允许的排序方式：calls, cumulative, file, line, module, name, nfl, pcalls, stdname, time等。具体的结果如何，大家可以试试。

Tensorflow

tf.Graph()

Tensorflow会提供一个默认的graph，tf.Constant()，tf.Variable()等操作会向这个默认graph添加 tf.Operation。

tf.Session()

一个 Tensor t, 调用 t.eval() 等价于tf.get_default_session().run(t)
InteractiveSession 作为默认的session ， 方法 Tensor.eval() and 使用这个默认会话运行。(Operation 没有eval()方法)

如果在创建时没有指定graph,那么使用默认的graph初始化

tf.Tensor tf.Operation

Note that tf.Tensor(边) objects are implicitly named after the tf.Operation(点) that produces the tensor as output. A tensor name has the form <OP_NAME>:<i> where:

  • <OP_NAME> OP的名字，如果多个OP重名，那么在OP_NAME加上后缀 _1 ,_2.
  • <i> 标志这个op产生的第几个Tensor

tf.Variable 类型

设置显存

Pytorch

Debug

RuntimeError: CUDNN_STATUS_INTERNAL_ERROR

备注

0.3.1版本没有no_grad;0.4.0才有no_grad;不自动求导只能定义torch.autograd.Function的继承类 

- NHWC is the TensorFlow default- NCHW is the pytorch default- NCHW is the optimal format to use when training on NVIDIA GPUs using cuDNN

torch.tensor 类型

module

参考资料

http://xianglong.me/article/analysis-python-application-performance-using-cProfile/

entry.title: Compressed Neural Network
entry.content:
Quantized Neural Network

low-precision Quantization

quantized weights only

每个float权重近似表示成几个bits

  • Matthieu-Courbariaux,Yoshua-Bengio,Jean-Pierre-David:“BinaryConnect: Training Deep Neural Networks with binary weights during propagations.” [NIPS 2015]

  • Jiaxiang Wu, Cong Leng, Yuhang Wang, Qinghao Hu, Jian Cheng:Quantized Convolutional Neural Networks for Mobile Devices[CVPR 2016]

    • 量化卷积层的权重，调整全连接层的全精度权重；再量化全连接层的权重
    • 提供了实际加速的效果对比，3-4倍左右的加速
    • 提供了移动端的实验结果对比，包括内存开销，储存时间，储存开销

  • Chenzhuo Zhu, Song Han, Huizi Mao, William J. Dally:
    Trained Ternary Quantization[ICLR 2017]

  • Aojun Zhou, Anbang Yao, Yiwen Guo, Lin Xu, Yurong Chen:
    “Incremental Network Quantization: Towards Lossless CNNs with Low-Precision Weights.”[ICLR 2017]

    • 简称INQ
    • 大的权重量化为2的幂次，小的权重保持全精度
    • 53$\times$压缩率，结合DNS

  • Yiwen Guo, Anbang Yao, Hao Zhao, Yurong Chen:Network Sketching: Exploiting Binary Structure in Deep CNNs[CVPR 2017]

    • 剩余量化权重
    • 利用Bit平面之间的差值来减少冗余计算
    • 3bit 权重 Resnet18 1% top1精度损失 fine-tuning

  • Felix Juefei-Xu, Vishnu Naresh Boddeti, Marios Savvides:
    Local Binary Convolutional Neural Networks. [CVPR 2017]

    • 一个三值卷积层(固定参数) + 一个1*1卷积层(科学系参数)替代一个完整卷积层
    • 更少的可训练参数，防止过拟合

  • Training Quantized Nets: A Deeper Understanding [NIPS 2017]

  • Learning Accurate Low-Bit Deep Neural Networks with Stochastic Quantization [BMVC 2017]

  • Loss-Aware Weight Quantization of Deep Networks. [ICLR 2018]

    • 基于近端牛顿法，对带有离散权重约束的目标进行优化
    • 优化过程中依然保留浮点权重，权重更新在浮点权重上进行

  • LEARNING DISCRETE WEIGHTS USING THE LOCAL
    REPARAMETERIZATION TRICK[ICLR 2018]

    • 每个权重是一个随机变量，由一组参数刻画。
    • 由中心极限定理，这一层的输出服从正太分布

  • Learning Accurate Low-Bit Deep Neural Networks with Stochastic Quantization. [BMVC 2018]

  • Explicit Loss-Error-Aware Quantization for Low-Bit Deep Neural Networks [CVPR 2018]

  • An Optimal Control Approach to Deep Learning and
    Applications to Discrete-Weight Neural Networks[ICML 2018]

    • 理论依据的离散权重神经网络的训练。

  • From Hashing to CNNs: Training Binary Weight Networks via Hashing. [AAAI 2018]

  • Deep Neural Network Compression with Single and Multiple Level Quantization[AAAI 2018]

    - 增量聚类量化，对权重进行聚类，基于每一个类簇的聚类(量化)对损失函数的影响，把所有的类簇划分量化部分和非量化部分，量化损失函数大的量化部分，重新训练剩余的非量化部分- 不再每层单独考虑，所有层一起考虑，对所有层的聚类量化损失在一起比较。- 效果略好于INQ，不是很明显。

  • Cong Leng, Zesheng Dou, Hao Li, Shenghuo Zhu, Rong Jin:Extremely Low Bit Neural Network: Squeeze the Last Bit Out with ADMM[AAAI 2018]

    • 使用ADMM，优化损失函数，更新W
    • 只量化权重到 $\alpha_i {0,1,-1,2,-2…2^N,-2^N}$
    • 在Resnet VGG Googlenet 实验，效果略好于TTQ

  • PROXQUANT: QUANTIZED NEURAL NETWORKS VIA
    PROXIMAL OPERATORS [ICLR 2019]

  • LEARNING RECURRENT BINARY/TERNARY WEIGHTS [ICLR 2019]

  • Add BatchNorm to LSTM for Quantized weights

  • Projection Convolutional Neural Networks for 1-bit CNNs via Discrete Back Propagation [AAAI 2019]

  • Simultaneously Optimizing Weight and Quantizer of Ternary Neural Network using Truncated Gaussian Approximation [CVPR 2019]

quantized activation

  • CATEGORICAL REPARAMETERIZATION WITH GUMBEL-SOFTMAX. [ICLR 2017]
  • Towards Binary-Valued Gates for Robust LSTM Training. [ICML 2018]
  • DEEP LEARNING AS A MIXED CONVEX- COMBINATORIAL OPTIMIZATION PROBLEM. [ICLR 2018]
  • DEFENSIVE QUANTIZATION: WHEN EFFICIENCY MEETS ROBUSTNESS [ICLR 2019]
    • leverage Quantized activation to boost defense

quantized weights and activations

  • Itay Hubara, Matthieu Courbariaux, Daniel Soudry, Ran El-Yaniv, Yoshua Bengio:
    “Binarized Neural Networks.” [NIPS 2016]
  • Mohammad Rastegari, Vicente Ordonez, Joseph Redmon, Ali Farhadi:
    “XNOR-Net: ImageNet Classification Using Binary Convolutional Neural Networks.” [ECCV 2016]
    • 对于activation,每个spitial position都要一个scale，那么一个输入为$C \times H{in} \times W{in}$的feature map需要$H{out} \times W{out}$个scale。
    • 对于权重,一个3D的卷积核需要一个scale。
    • AlexNet 44.2% Top1 , 69.2% Top5
  • Zhaowei Cai, Xiaodong He, Jian Sun, Nuno Vasconcelos:
    “Deep Learning with Low Precision by Half-wave Gaussian Quantization.”[CVPR 2017]

  • Shuchang Zhou, Zekun Ni, Xinyu Zhou, He Wen, Yuxin Wu, Yuheng Zou:
    “DoReFa-Net: Training Low Bitwidth Convolutional Neural Networks with Low Bitwidth Gradients”[arXiv’ 2016]

    • SVHN和Alexnet上实验，1bit权重，4bits输入，3%top1精度损失
  • Zefan Li, Bingbing Ni, Wenjun Zhang, Xiaokang Yang, Wen Gao:
    Performance Guaranteed Network Acceleration via High-Order Residual Quantization.[ICCV 2017]
    • 只在Mnist和Cifar10上做了实验
    • 一次卷积(一个卷积核)的浮点开销变为$\frac{K}{c_{in}k^2}$，K是量化阶数(一般取{1,2,3,4})
    • Cifar10的精度降低了3%,在一个自己构造的CNN
  • Zhaowei Cai, Xiaodong He, Jian Sun, Nuno Vasconcelos:
    Deep Learning with Low Precision by Half-Wave Gaussian Quantization. [CVPR 2017]
    • 1bit权重，nbits输入
    • Alexnet,VGG,Resnet,GoogLenet
    • 1bit权重,2bits输入,Resnet18,10% top1损失,7%的top5损失;
  • Wei Tang, Gang Hua, Liang Wang:How to Train a Compact Binary Neural Network with High Accuracy?[AAAI 2017]
    • 整个激活一个scale，剩余量化激活，有scale。1bit 权重，无scale。
    • 使用PRelu作为激活函数，量化 -> 卷积 -> PReLU -> BN
    • 损失函数加入正则项 $\sum_i (1-w_i^2)$
  • Wei Pan,Xiaofan Lin,Cong Zhao
    Towards Accurate Binary Convolutional Neural Network[NIPS 2017]
    • resnet18 上，5bits权重，5bits输入,4.3% top1 精度损失,3.3% top5精度损失
    • 输入的scale在训练时固定，不用在测试时再去求
  • WRPN: Wide Reduced-Precision Networks. [ICLR 2018]
  • TRAINING AND INFERENCE WITH INTEGERS IN DEEP NEURAL NETWORKS. [ICLR 2018]
  • ALTERNATING MULTI-BIT QUANTIZATION FOR
    RECURRENT NEURAL NETWORKS [ICLR 2018]
    • 缩放因子+比特平面，重构全精度的权重/激活，最小化重构误差，迭代求解缩放因子、比特平面
    • 针对RNN
  • Distribution-Aware Binarization of Neural Networks for Sketch Recognition [WACV 2018]
  • Hybrid Binary Networks: Optimizing for Accuracy, Efficiency and Memory [WACV 2018]
  • SYQ: Learning Symmetric Quantization For Efficient Deep Neural Networks [CVPR 2018]
  • Towards Effective Low-bitwidth Convolutional Neural Networks [CVPR 2018]
    • Train BNN for 32bit to 16bit to 8bit to 4bit to 2bit
  • Two-Step Quantization for Low-bit Neural Networks[CVPR 2018]
    • 权重量化和激活量化分开做，先训练量化激活的网络，求一个好的离散权重的初始解，训练量化激活和权重的网络
  • Learning Low Precision Deep Neural Networks through Regularization [arXiv 2018]
    • Add Quantization Regularization item
  • Bi-Real Net: Enhancing the Performance of 1-bit CNNs With Improved Representational Capability and Advanced Training Algorithm [ECCV 2018]
    • Add a extra shortcut in between two conv in one res-block.
  • learning Compression from Limited Unlabeled Data [ECCV 2018]
  • TBN: Convolutional Neural Network with Ternary Inputs and Binary Weights [ECCV 2018]
  • LQ-Nets: Learned Quantization for Highly
    Accurate and Compact Deep Neural Networks [ECCV 2018]
    • 最小化每一层的量化重构误差
  • Heterogeneous Bitwidth Binarization in Convolutional Neural Networks [NIPS 2018]
  • HitNet: Hybrid Ternary Recurrent Neural Network [NIPS 2018]
  • RELAXED QUANTIZATION FOR
    DISCRETIZED NEURAL NETWORKS [ICLR 2019]
    • Gumbel-Softmax STE 训练离散的激活函数
  • A SYSTEMATIC STUDY OF BINARY NEURAL NETWORKS’ OPTIMISATION [ICLR 2019]
    • How to Train BNN. Hyper-Parameter settings
  • Composite Binary Decomposition Networks [AAAI 2019]
  • A Main/Subsidiary Network Framework for Simplifying Binary Neural Networks [CVPR 2019]
    • Prune BNN with mask trained

  • Training Quantized Network with Auxiliary Gradient Module [arXiv 2019]

    • Likely Knowledge Distill / Attention Transfer. Add Auxiliary Loss to every layer
  • HAQ: Hardware-Aware Automated Quantization [CVPR 2019]
    • Reinforce Learning to allocate different bits for different layers
  • Structured Binary Neural Networks for Accurate Image Classification and Semantic Segmentation [CVPR 2019]
  • Regularizing Activation Distribution for Training Binarized Deep Networks [CVPR 2019]
    • Regularizing Batch-Normlize output to the scope of [-1,1]
  • Binary Ensemble Neural Network: More Bits per Network or More Networks per Bit? [CVPR 2019]
  • Learning to Quantize Deep Networks by Optimizing Quantization Intervals with Task Loss [CVPR 2019]
    • Learn Quantized funtions intervals
  • Matrix and tensor decompositions for training binary neural networks [arXiv 2019]
    • Add capacity of float weight to get more accurate binary weight

Gradient Quantization

  • TernGrad: Ternary Gradients to Reduce Communication in Distributed Deep Learning [NIPS 2017]
  • QSGD: Communication-Efficient SGD via Gradient Quantization and Encoding [NIPS 2017]
  • Value-aware Quantization for Training and Inference of Neural Networks [ECCV 2018]
  • Gradient Sparsification for Communication-Efficient Distributed Optimization [NIPS 2018]
  • ANALYSIS OF QUANTIZED DEEP NETWORKS [ICLR 2019]

Weight-Sharing Quantization

一组权重共享同一个权重值

  • Wenlin Chen, James T. Wilson, Stephen Tyree, Kilian Q. Weinberger, Yixin Chen:Compressing Neural Networks with the Hashing Trick. [ICML 2015] </span>
  • Song Han, Huizi Mao, William J. Dally:
    Deep Compression: Compressing Deep Neural Network with Pruning, Trained Quantization and Huffman Coding[ICLR 2016 Best paper]
  • Karen Ullrich, Edward Meeds, Max Welling:
    Soft Weight-Sharing for Neural Network Compression.[ICLR 2017]
  • TOWARDS THE LIMIT OF NETWORK QUANTIZATION [ICLR 2017]
  • Deep k-Means: Re-Training and Parameter Sharing with Harder Cluster
    Assignments for Compressing Deep Convolutions [ICML 2018]
  • VARIATIONAL NETWORK QUANTIZATION [ICLR 2018]
    • 优化变分下界，使用多个spike-and-slab组成的先验，使得最终权重区域几个离散的值
  • Clustering Convolutional Kernels to Compress Deep Neural Networks [ECCV 2018]
  • Coreset-Based Neural Network Compression [ECCV 2018]
  • Learning Versatile Filters for Efficient Convolutional Neural Networks [NIPS 2018]
  • Exploiting Kernel Sparsity and Entropy for Interpretable CNN Compression [CVPR 2019]

Pruning Neural Network

  • Dong Yu,Frank Seide,Gang Li, Li Deng:EXPLOITING SPARSENESS IN DEEP NEURAL NETWORKS FOR LARGE VOCABULARY
    SPEECH RECOGNITION    [ICASSP 2012]
    • 最早的剪枝？用于语音识别
  • Song Han, Jeff Pool, John Tran, William J. Dally:
    Learning both Weights and Connections for Efficient Neural Networks.[NIPS 2015]
    • 在Alexnet上剪掉89%的参数，在VGG上剪掉92.5%的参数主要是全连接层
    • 在Lenet-5上保留8%的参数
  • Wei Wen, Chunpeng Wu, Yandan Wang, Yiran Chen, Hai Li:
    Learning Structured Sparsity in Deep Neural Networks. [NIPS 2016]
    • 在Alexnet上5.1倍的CPU加速，3.1倍的GPU加速
  • Yiwen Guo, Anbang Yao, Yurong Chen:
    Dynamic Network Surgery for Efficient DNNs. [NIPS 2016]
    • 在Alexnet上17.7倍的压缩率
    • 在Lenet-5上只保留0.9%的参数
    • 比[NIPS 2015]的训练速度快7倍
  • Variational Dropout Sparsifies Deep Neural Networks [ICML 2017]
  • Pavlo Molchanov, Stephen Tyree, Tero Karras, Timo Aila, Jan Kautz
    NVIDIA:PRUNING CONVOLUTIONAL NEURAL NETWORKS FOR RESOURCE EFFICIENT INFERENCE[ICLR 2017]
  • Jian-Hao Luo, Jianxin Wu, Weiyao Lin:
    ThiNet: A Filter Level Pruning Method for Deep Neural Network Compression.[ICCV 2017]
    • 在VGG和Resnet-50上实验，数据集ImageNet，平台caffe
    • 可以在Resnet-50上剪掉50%的参数和FLOPS,1%精度损失
    • layer by layer 剪掉某些channel
  • Learning Efficient Convolutional Networks through Network Slimming [ICCV 2017]
    • Reg BN scale with L1-norm to prune channel
  • Structured Bayesian Pruning via Log-Normal Multiplicative Noise [NIPS 2017]
  • Learning to Prune Deep Neural Networks via Layer-wise Optimal Brain Surgeon [NIPS 2017]
  • Recovering from Random Pruning: On the Plasticity of Deep Convolutional Neural Networks [WACV 2018]
  • RETHINKING THE SMALLER-NORM-LESS-INFORMATIVE ASSUMPTION IN CHANNEL PRUNING OF CONVOLUTION LAYERS [ICLR 2018]
  • LEARNING TO SHARE: SIMULTANEOUS PARAMETER TYING AND SPARSIFICATION IN DEEP LEARNING [ICLR 2018]
  • LEARNING SPARSE NEURAL NETWORKS THROUGH L0 REGULARIZATION [ICLR 2018]
  • “Learning-Compression” Algorithms for Neural Net Pruning [CVPR 2018]
  • PackNet: Adding Multiple Tasks to a Single Network by Iterative Pruning [CVPR 2018]
  • Soft Filter Pruning for Accelerating Deep Convolutional Neural Networks [IJCAI 2018]
  • A Systematic DNN Weight Pruning Framework using Alternating Direction Method of Multipliers [ECCV 2018]
  • Data-Driven Sparse Structure Selection for Deep Neural Network [ECCV 2018]
  • Discrimination-aware Channel Pruning for Deep Neural Networks [NIPS 2018]
  • Synaptic Strength For Convolutional Neural Network [NIPS 2018]
  • Learning Sparse Neural Networks via Sensitivity-Driven Regularization [NIPS 2018]
  • Frequency-Domain Dynamic Pruning for Convolutional Neural Networks [NIPS 2018]
  • Dynamic Channel Pruning: Feature Boosting and Suppression [ICLR 2019]
  • SNIP: SINGLE-SHOT NETWORK PRUNING BASED ON CONNECTION SENSITIVITY [ICLR 2019]
  • ENERGY-CONSTRAINED COMPRESSION FOR DEEP NEURAL NETWORKS VIA WEIGHTED SPARSE PROJEC-
    TION AND LAYER INPUT MASKING [ICLR 2019]
  • RePr: Improved Training of Convolutional Filters [CVPR 2019]
  • Pruning Filter via Geometric Median for Deep Convolutional Neural Networks Acceleration [CVPR 2019]
  • Centripetal SGD for Pruning Very Deep Convolutional Networks with Complicated Structure [CVPR 2019]
  • Fully Learnable Group Convolution for Acceleration of Deep Neural Networks [CVPR 2019]
  • On Implicit Filter Level Sparsity in Convolutional Neural Networks [CVPR 2019]
  • ECC: Platform-Independent Energy-Constrained Deep Neural Network Compression via a Bilinear Regression Model [CVPR 2019]
  • Towards Optimal Structured CNN Pruning via Generative Adversarial Learning [CVPR 2019]
  • Cascaded Projection: End-to-End Network Compression and Acceleration [CVPR 2019]

Matrix Decomposition

  • Emily L. Denton, Wojciech Zaremba, Joan Bruna, Yann LeCun, Rob Fergus:
    Exploiting Linear Structure Within Convolutional Networks for Efficient Evaluation.[NIPS 2014]
    • 2.5倍加速 在Alexnet上 2-3倍卷积层参数减少 ，小于1%的精度损失
  • Vadim Lebedev, Yaroslav Ganin, Maksim Rakhuba, Ivan V. Oseledets, Victor S. Lempitsky:
    Speeding-up Convolutional Neural Networks Using Fine-tuned CP-Decomposition.[ICLR 2015]
    • 4.5倍加速 在Alexnet conv2上
    • $1 \times 1$ conv $\rightarrow$ 一个feature map的垂直conv $\rightarrow$ 一个feature map的水平conv-> $1\times 1$ conv
  • Cheng Tai, Tong Xiao, Yi Zhang, Xiaogang Wang, Weinan E:CONVOLUTIONAL NEURAL NETWORKS WITH LOW- RANK REGULARIZATION[ICLR 2016]
    • 扩展Jaderberg et al.(2014)
    • 一个卷积层分解成两个1D卷积层，不适用矩阵分解的最优解调整，从头训练Alexnet得到更好的效果(需要BN)
    • VGG16 2.75倍的压缩率
  • Accelerating Very Deep Convolutional Networks for Classification and Detection [TPAMI 2016]
  • Tensor-Train Recurrent Neural Networks for Video Classification [ICML 2017]
  • Domain-adaptive deep network compression [ICCV 2017]
  • Coordinating Filters for Faster Deep Neural Networks [ICCV 2017]
  • Jose M. Alvarez,Mathieu Salzmann:[Compression-aware Training of Deep Networks [NIPS 2017]
    • Resnet50 27% 参数压缩
    • 在Decomposed网络上从头开始训练，Decompose:把一个2D卷积层分成两个1D卷积层，中间加入一个激活函数
  • Learning Compact Recurrent Neural Networks with Block-Term Tensor Decomposition [CVPR 2018]
  • Wide Compression: Tensor Ring Nets [CVPR 2018]
  • Extreme Network Compression via Filter Group Approximation [ECCV 2018]
  • Trained Rank Pruning for Efficient Deep Neural Networks [arXiv 2018]
  • Compressing Recurrent Neural Networks with Tensor Ring for Action Recognition [AAAI 2019]
  • T-Net: Parametrizing Fully Convolutional Nets with a Single High-Order Tensor [CVPR 2019]

Knowledge Distill

  • Distilling the Knowledge in a Neural Network [2014]
  • FITNETS: HINTS FOR THIN DEEP NETS [ICLR 2015]
  • PAYING MORE ATTENTION TO ATTENTION:IMPROVING THE PERFORMANCE OF CONVOLUTIONAL
    NEURAL NETWORKS VIA ATTENTION TRANSFER [ICLR 2017]
  • Mimicking Very Efficient Network for Object Detection [CVPR 2017]
  • A Gift from Knowledge Distillation: Fast Optimization, Network Minimization and Transfer Learning [CVPR 2017]
  • Deep Mutual Learning [CVPR 2018]
  • Data Distillation: Towards Omni-Supervised Learning [CVPR 2018]
  • Quantization Mimic: Towards Very Tiny CNNfor Object Detection [ECCV 2018]
  • KDGAN: Knowledge Distillation with Generative Adversarial Networks [NIPS 2018]
  • Knowledge Distillation by On-the-Fly Native Ensemble [NIPS 2018]
  • Paraphrasing Complex Network: Network Compression via Factor Transfer [NIPS 2018]
  • Knowledge Transfer via Distillation of Activation Boundaries Formed by Hidden Neurons [AAAI 2019]
  • Relational Knowledge Distillation [CVPR 2019]
  • Snapshot Distillation: Teacher-Student Optimization in One Generation [CVPR 2019]

HardWare

  • FINN: A Framework for Fast, Scalable Binarized Neural Network Inference. [FPGA 2017]
entry.summary:
Quantized Neural Network

low-precision Quantization

quantized weights only

每个float权重近似表示成几个bits

  • Matthieu-Courbariaux,Yoshua-Bengio,Jean-Pierre-David:“BinaryConnect: Training Deep Neural Networks with binary weights during propagations.” [NIPS 2015]

  • Jiaxiang Wu, Cong Leng, Yuhang Wang, Qinghao Hu, Jian Cheng:Quantized Convolutional Neural Networks for Mobile Devices[CVPR 2016]

    • 量化卷积层的权重，调整全连接层的全精度权重；再量化全连接层的权重
    • 提供了实际加速的效果对比，3-4倍左右的加速
    • 提供了移动端的实验结果对比，包括内存开销，储存时间，储存开销

  • Chenzhuo Zhu, Song Han, Huizi Mao, William J. Dally:
    Trained Ternary Quantization[ICLR 2017]

  • Aojun Zhou, Anbang Yao, Yiwen Guo, Lin Xu, Yurong Chen:
    “Incremental Network Quantization: Towards Lossless CNNs with Low-Precision Weights.”[ICLR 2017]

    • 简称INQ
    • 大的权重量化为2的幂次，小的权重保持全精度
    • 53$\times$压缩率，结合DNS

  • Yiwen Guo, Anbang Yao, Hao Zhao, Yurong Chen:Network Sketching: Exploiting Binary Structure in Deep CNNs[CVPR 2017]

    • 剩余量化权重
    • 利用Bit平面之间的差值来减少冗余计算
    • 3bit 权重 Resnet18 1% top1精度损失 fine-tuning

  • Felix Juefei-Xu, Vishnu Naresh Boddeti, Marios Savvides:
    Local Binary Convolutional Neural Networks. [CVPR 2017]

    • 一个三值卷积层(固定参数) + 一个1*1卷积层(科学系参数)替代一个完整卷积层
    • 更少的可训练参数，防止过拟合

  • Training Quantized Nets: A Deeper Understanding [NIPS 2017]

  • Learning Accurate Low-Bit Deep Neural Networks with Stochastic Quantization [BMVC 2017]

  • Loss-Aware Weight Quantization of Deep Networks. [ICLR 2018]

    • 基于近端牛顿法，对带有离散权重约束的目标进行优化
    • 优化过程中依然保留浮点权重，权重更新在浮点权重上进行

  • LEARNING DISCRETE WEIGHTS USING THE LOCAL
    REPARAMETERIZATION TRICK[ICLR 2018]

    • 每个权重是一个随机变量，由一组参数刻画。
    • 由中心极限定理，这一层的输出服从正太分布

  • Learning Accurate Low-Bit Deep Neural Networks with Stochastic Quantization. [BMVC 2018]

  • Explicit Loss-Error-Aware Quantization for Low-Bit Deep Neural Networks [CVPR 2018]

  • An Optimal Control Approach to Deep Learning and
    Applications to Discrete-Weight Neural Networks[ICML 2018]

    • 理论依据的离散权重神经网络的训练。

  • From Hashing to CNNs: Training Binary Weight Networks via Hashing. [AAAI 2018]

  • Deep Neural Network Compression with Single and Multiple Level Quantization[AAAI 2018]

    - 增量聚类量化，对权重进行聚类，基于每一个类簇的聚类(量化)对损失函数的影响，把所有的类簇划分量化部分和非量化部分，量化损失函数大的量化部分，重新训练剩余的非量化部分
- 不再每层单独考虑，所有层一起考虑，对所有层的聚类量化损失在一起比较。
- 效果略好于INQ，不是很明显。

  • Cong Leng, Zesheng Dou, Hao Li, Shenghuo Zhu, Rong Jin:Extremely Low Bit Neural Network: Squeeze the Last Bit Out with ADMM[AAAI 2018]

    • 使用ADMM，优化损失函数，更新W
    • 只量化权重到 $\alpha_i {0,1,-1,2,-2…2^N,-2^N}$
    • 在Resnet VGG Googlenet 实验，效果略好于TTQ

  • PROXQUANT: QUANTIZED NEURAL NETWORKS VIA
    PROXIMAL OPERATORS [ICLR 2019]

  • LEARNING RECURRENT BINARY/TERNARY WEIGHTS [ICLR 2019]

  • Add BatchNorm to LSTM for Quantized weights

  • Projection Convolutional Neural Networks for 1-bit CNNs via Discrete Back Propagation [AAAI 2019]

  • Simultaneously Optimizing Weight and Quantizer of Ternary Neural Network using Truncated Gaussian Approximation [CVPR 2019]

entry.title: 机器学习-凸优化
entry.content:
Continuous and Differentiable

  • 紧集(compact):有界的(bounded),闭的(closed,包含极限点)
  • 几乎处处可导的函数，是在除去在一个测度为0的集合上，其余位置都可导的函数。
  • 连续是定义在某个点上，一致连续是定义在整个函数定义域。
  • Continuously differentiable ⊆ Lipschitz continuous ⊆ absolutely continuous ⊆ bounded variation ⊆ differentiable almost everywhere
  • Hessian矩阵是正定的，一阶导数为0的点为极小值；Hessian矩阵是负定的，一阶导数为0的点为极大值

Convex

definition

凸函数(convex)：

强凸函数(strongly-convex) Definition1：

强凸函数(strongly-convex) Definition1：

  • 等价： $t \in [0,1]$
  • 性质：strongly-convex feature1

L-Lipschitz Continuity

L-smooth : 首先f是凸函数

  • 等价：L-smooth Quadratic upper-bound:
  • 等价：L-smooth Co-coercivity Lower Bound:

  • 等价：L-smooth Upper Bound:

  • 性质：L-smooth feature1

closed function

Closed Set
a set $C$ is $ extbf{closed}$ if it contains its boundary:

Epigraph

Closed function
a function is closed if its epigraph is a closed set
$ extbf{Example}：$

convex conjugate

函数$f:\mathbb{R}^d ightarrow \mathbb{R}$的凸共轭函数定义为：

$f^*$ 是闭的且是凸的(尽管$f$可能不满足)

  • Double conjugate: $(f^)^ = f$ if $f$ is closed and convex

convex loss

平方损失(square-loss): $y \in \mathbb{R} $

对数损失(logistic loss): $y \in {-1,1}$

一阶导数(one order of diff of square-loss)

二阶导数(two order of diff of square-loss)

— 求二阶Hessian矩阵的特征值:

所以平方损失(square-loss)是凸函数，若$\Phi ( oldsymbol{x}_i) ^T \Phi ( oldsymbol{x}_i) \geq c ,c>0.$那么平方损失(square-loss)是强凸函数

Projected Gradient Descent

其中$f$是凸函数且$ oldsymbol{X}$是凸集

梯度下降：$x_{t+1}’ = x_t - \gamma abla f（x_t）$

但是$x{t+1}’$可能不在$ oldsymbol{X}$里面，所以要把$x{t+1}’$投影到集合$ oldsymbol{X}$里面

投影函数定义：

对于$L$平滑的凸函数,$\gamma = rac{1}{L}$

Lasso

对于优化目标：

使用近端梯度下降(Proximal Gradient Descent)求解，有闭式解：

其中 $\quad oldsymbol{z} = [z^1,z^2,…,z^n]^T \quad oldsymbol{x_k} = [x_k^1,x_k^2,…,x_k^n]^T \quad oldsymbol{z} = oldsymbol{x}_k - rac{1}{L} abla f( oldsymbol{x}_k)$.
$ abla f$ 满足L-lipschitz条件, $L$ 为L-lipschitz常数,$f$ 的泰勒展示近似如下：

  • 所以L1-norm会产生稀疏解，且$\lambda$越大，产生的解越稀疏。

  • 由于$f(x)$的泰勒展示是近似表示，所以使用$ rac{1}{L}$的学习率梯度下降不能直接得到最优解，还是需要迭代求解

  • 在神经网络中不可能显示得到$L$的值,所以需要设置一个学习率使用梯度下降的方法求解,即使带上了1-norm也是可以求梯度的。

group-lasso

使用PGD求解可能产生全零解；注意$K_j = I$时，对应l2-norm不带平方。

ADMM

  • Penalty Problem

​ $f(x)$是凸的，光滑的；$g(x)$是凸的，不可导的。

​ (1) 转化成下面形式使用ADMM求解(或者对偶梯度上升)：

​ (2) proximal gradient method 收敛率为$ rac{1}{\epsilon}$

​ (3) Accelerated proximal gradient method 收敛率为$ rac{1}{\sqrt{\epsilon}}$

​ (4) coordinate descent method:

​ For lasso-problem, alternate solve any dim of $x$, for sloving a scalar variable, there is closed 

     form.Just let gradient to be zero.
  • General Constraint Problem

对于下述约束问题，其中约束$C$可以为各种约束，非仿射的，不可导的，例如$||x||_1 \leq K$

​ (1) 可以转化为无约束问题，再使用ADMM求解：

​ 只要$C$是凸集，$I_C(x)$就是凸函数，只要同时$f(x)$也是凸函数就有收敛性保证。

​ ADMM对于任何$ ho$ 都可以收敛，只是收敛快慢的问题。

​ (2) 此外还可以使用投影梯度下降(PGD)，$\Pi$为欧式投影

​ 投影(projected)梯度下降是近端(proximal)梯度下降的一个特例

​ (3) 使用Frank-Wolfe，比投影梯度下降更快

  • Equality Constraint Problem (一般为线性约束)

    (1)对于等式约束，采用对偶梯度上升法或者ADMM，EE364B

    (2)采用罚函数法: 逐渐增大$\lambda$

    (3) Primal-dual Subgradient EE364B

  • Inequality Constraint Problem (一般为线性约束)

    (1) 对于不等式约束，采用对偶梯度上升法求解

    ​ Primal Step

​ Dual Step 不再是一般的梯度下降，因为对偶变量$\lambda_i \geq 0$，这个约束的存在，所以采用投影梯度下降(PGD)

​ 对偶函数：

​ 对偶梯度

​ 对偶更新

​ 类似的采用ADMM算法。

(2) 不等式约束转化为等式约束

PCA(主成分分析)

用于矩阵分解：

Convolution(im2col)

forward

backward

克罗内内积(Kronecker product)

性质

如果A、B、C和D是四个矩阵，且矩阵乘积AC和BD存在

增量求解均值和方差

样本序列

全局样本均值

全局样本方差

独立随机变量

X,Y是两个相互独立的随机变量

Norm

级数

$ rac{1}{\sqrt{1}} + \dots + rac{1}{\sqrt{n}} \approx O(\sqrt{n})$ 微积分夹逼得到

正太分布性质

函数曲线下68.268949%的面积在平均值左右的一个标准差范围内
95.449974%的面积在平均值左右两个标准差2σ的范围内
99.730020%的面积在平均值左右三个标准差3σ的范围内
99.993666%的面积在平均值左右四个标准差4σ的范围内

参考资料

  • http://www.cnblogs.com/yoyaprogrammer/p/delta_variance.html
